name: hackhilis
description: A cybersecurity-themed strategy game where players hack, learn, and build alliances

scripts.build: cd hv1 && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: cd hv1 && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
